category.scope_note: Household refrigerators and freezers sold by Chinese exporters into Singapore, compared against Singapore baseline obligations and energy/safety systems.

target_market_label.zh: 新加坡（EMA / 企业发展局）
target_market_label.zht: 新加坡（EMA / 企業發展局）

title.zh: 中国家用电冰箱进入新加坡市场：合规差距对照
title.zht: 中國家用電冰箱進入新加坡市場：合規差距對照

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China household refrigerator compliance against Singapore energy labelling, CPSR safety registration, and market-entry processes, including mandatory versus non-mandatory requirements in both markets.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用冰箱与新加坡能效标识、Consumer Product Safety Register（CPSR）安全注册与市场准入流程对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用電冰箱與新加坡能效標識、Consumer Product Safety Register（CPSR）安全登記與市場准入流程對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, customs ruling, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current requirements directly with official Singapore and Chinese authorities before shipment or sale.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或销售前应直接向新加坡与中国主管部门核验最新要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或銷售前應直接向新加坡與中國主管部門核驗最新要求。

answer_first.en: For Chinese refrigerator exporters, Singapore most often differs on structured product-safety registration (SAFETY Mark / CPSR pathway) and specific Singapore energy-marking requirements rather than on core appliance construction alone.
answer_first.zh: 对于中国家电厂商而言，新加坡与中国主要差异通常体现在安全注册路径（SAFETY Mark/CPSR）和新加坡特定能效标识要求，而不是产品构造本身。
answer_first.zht: 對於中國家電廠商而言，新加坡與中國主要差異通常體現在安全註冊路徑（SAFETY Mark/CPSR）與新加坡特定能效標識要求，而不是產品構造本身。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Re-run source checks at least every quarter, then update source URLs and mandatory_status text when agency notices or standards revisions are published.
